descriptors.name: TTDF_PROJECT_DEMO_V1
descriptors.label: TTDF Project Demo V1
descriptors.description: Demo project for TTDF hardware integration. Short readme: Wi-SUN demo and examples.
descriptors.author: Himanshu Fanibhare

properties.value: brd2705a brd4163a brd4164a brd4170a brd4253a brd4254a brd4270b brd4271a brd4272a brd4400c brd4401a brd4401b brd4401c com.silabs.board.none

descriptors.name: PHY_COAP_CODE
descriptors.label: PHY CoAP Code
descriptors.description: Wi-SUN CoAP protocol implementation and examples. Lightweight RESTful communication optimized for constrained devices. This project supports CoAP only and does not support OTA.
descriptors.author: Himanshu Fanibhare

properties.value: brd2705a brd4163a brd4164a brd4170a brd4253a brd4254a brd4270b brd4271a brd4272a brd4400c brd4401a brd4401b brd4401c com.silabs.board.none
